Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO whale bets, smart money moves, or mispriced markets reported in real-time data | LOW confidence**  
Polymarket's most active markets as of April 22, 2026, focus on **Elon Musk tweet predictions**, including "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" and "Elon Musk musk # tweets in April 2026?", with the 1120-1159 tweet range at 19-21%
matched_markets: Will Trump name "Elon" or "Musk" in April?
